html:
Exclusive to:

A Doydoy Egg is a large spotted blue-green egg. They can be found by picking Doydoy Nests, which are spawned when Doydoys mate. Unlike Tallbirds, Doydoys will not chase the player if their egg is stolen. Doydoy Eggs will hatch into Baby Doydoys only when they are in a Doydoy Nest, and unlike Tallbird Eggs they cannot be made to hatch around Campfire. However, placing them in empty Nests allows them to hatch.

When used in Crock Pots, Doydoy eggs will have an Egg value of 1 (this is the same as 1 Egg). Thus, it is not recommended to use Doydoy Eggs in cooking unless you have at least 2 Doydoy Eggs or living Doydoys.

Fried Doydoy Egg

A Fried Doydoy Egg is the result of cooking a Doydoy Egg over a Campfire, Fire Pit, Obsidian Fire Pit, Chiminea, Krissure, or Star.

Trivia

  • Wickerbottom's quote on Fried Doydoy Egg is a reference to children's book by Dr. Seuss "Green Eggs and Ham".

Usage

“Maybe I should have let it hatch.”
–Wilson
“Dumb egg.”
–Willow
“Eat raw, good for mighty muscles!”
–Wolfgang
“What a dumb egg.”
–Wendy
“THEY HAVE A DISGUSTING MANUFACTURING PROCESS”
–WX-78
“Nature always finds a way.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like good eatin' to me.”
–Woodie
“Hmm, propagate a dying species or enjoy a light snack?”
–Maxwell
“Shall I cook it? Or leave it to hatch more imbeciles?”
–Wagstaff
“Within this egg gröws a Viking öf anöther feather.”
–Wigfrid
“Where dumb life begins.”
–Webber
“Could be a doydoy. Or could be dinner.”
–Walani
“Hello, breakfast.”
–Warly
“'Tis a free meal!”
–Woodlegs
“DOYNESS LURKS WITHIN”
–Wilba
“Odd Tweeter inside?”
–Wormwood
“The polka dots mean it's ripe.”
–Wheeler
A Doydoy Egg is a large spotted blue-green egg. They can be found by picking Doydoy Nests, which are spawned when Doydoys mate. Unlike Tallbirds, Doydoys will not chase the player if their egg is stolen. Doydoy Eggs will hatch into Baby Doydoys only when they are in a Doydoy Nest, and unlike Tallbird Eggs they cannot be made to hatch around Campfire. However, placing them in empty Nests allows them to hatch.
When used in Crock Pots, Doydoy eggs will have an Egg value of 1 (this is the same as 1 Egg). Thus, it is not recommended to use Doydoy Eggs in cooking unless you have at least 2 Doydoy Eggs or living Doydoys.
Fried Doydoy Egg[edit | edit source]
“A controlled chemical reaction has made this egg matter more nutritious.”
–Wilson
“Cooking this dumb egg was smart of me.”
–Willow
“Stupidly tasty protein.”
–Wolfgang
“Not extinct yet, though not from lack of trying.”
–Wendy
“EATING IS DUMB”
–WX-78
“Green eggs and ham.”
–Wickerbottom
“Could use a side of Canadian bacon.”
–Woodie
“A light snack is always the best option.”
–Maxwell
“The color doesn't fill me with a lot of confidence.”
–Wagstaff
“I shall eat öf this fearless bird's böunty.”
–Wigfrid
“To make an omelette you have to endanger a few species.”
–Webber
“You can taste the endangerment.”
–Walani
“Bon appetit!”
–Warly
“Yer would-be goose is cooked!”
–Woodlegs
“FWOOSH'DED EGG O' DOYNESS”
–Wilba
“Fired egg”
–Wormwood
“Just once I'd love to make a decent plate of scrambled eggs.”
–Wheeler
A Fried Doydoy Egg is the result of cooking a Doydoy Egg over a Campfire, Fire Pit, Obsidian Fire Pit, Chiminea, Krissure, or Star.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Wickerbottom's quote on Fried Doydoy Egg is a reference to children's book by Dr. Seuss "Green Eggs and Ham".

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Trứng Doydoy là một quả trứng lớn có màu xanh lục có đốm. Chúng có thể được tìm thấy bằng cách chọn Tổ Doydoy, chúng xuất hiện khi Doydoy giao phối. Không giống như Chim Cao, Doydoys sẽ không đuổi theo người chơi nếu trứng của họ bị đánh cắp. Trứng Doydoy sẽ chỉ nở thành Doydoy Con khi chúng ở trong Tổ Doydoy, và không giống như Trứng Chân Cao, chúng không thể nở xung quanh Lửa Trại. Tuy nhiên, đặt chúng vào các Tổ trống sẽ cho phép chúng nở.

A '''Doydoy Egg''' is a large spotted blue-green egg. They can be found by picking [[Doydoy Nests]], which are spawned when [[Doydoys]] mate. Unlike [[Tallbirds]], Doydoys will not chase the player if their egg is stolen. Doydoy Eggs will hatch into Baby Doydoys only when they are in a Doydoy Nest, and unlike [[Tallbird Eggs]] they cannot be made to hatch around [[Campfire]]. However, placing them in empty Nests allows them to hatch.

When used in [[Crock Pot]]s, Doydoy eggs will have an [[Eggs|Egg value]] of 1 (this is the same as 1 [[Egg]]). Thus, it is not recommended to use Doydoy Eggs in cooking unless you have at least 2 Doydoy Eggs or living Doydoys.
